tip.heading: Tip of the day
tip.body: Call a lapsed donor today — not to ask for money, but just to say thank you for their past support. You'll be surprised how often that call alone restarts a relationship.

quote.text: People don't give to charities. They give to people with causes.
quote.author: Unknown

news.headline: Australian giving hits record $13.4B
news.summary: New data shows Australians gave more in 2025 than any previous year, driven by mid-value recurring giving programs.

motivation: Every conversation you have today could be the one that changes someone's life. Pick up the phone.
